properties.name: Permian–Triassic GSSP, Meishan section, China
properties.description: Global Stratotype Section and Point for the base of the Triassic System (and the Mesozoic Erathem), defined at bed 27c of the Meishan D section, Zhejiang, China. Defined by the first appearance of the conodont Hindeodus parvus.

boundaryDefinitionEvent.title: First Appearance Datum of Hindeodus parvus

$comment: Synthesised example modelled on the published Permian–Triassic GSSP at Meishan, China. Property structure inferred from the GeoSciML 4.1 GSSP class; values are illustrative.
